settingsFields.name: advisorModel
settingsFields.describe: Advisor model for the server-side advisor tool.

settingsFields.name: agent
settingsFields.describe: Name of an agent (built-in or custom) to use for the main thread. Applies the agent's system prompt, tool restrictions, and model. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents

settingsFields.name: allowedChannelPlugins
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Allowlist of plugin IDs whose MCP servers may advertise channel notifications when channelsEnabled is true. When set, only the listed plugins can push inbound messages. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settingsFields.name: allowedHttpHookUrls
settingsFields.describe: Allowlist of URL patterns that HTTP hooks may target. Supports * as a wildcard. When set, hooks with non-matching URLs are blocked. Undefined = no restriction, empty array = block all HTTP hooks. Arrays merge across settings sources. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#hook-configuration

settingsFields.name: allowedMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise allowlist of MCP servers that can be used. Applies to all scopes including enterprise servers from managed-mcp.json. If undefined, all servers are allowed. If empty array, no servers are allowed. Denylist takes precedence - if a server is on both lists, it is denied. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp#restriction-options

settingsFields.name: allowManagedHooksOnly
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Prevent loading of user, project, and plugin hooks. Only allows managed hooks and SDK hooks. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#hook-configuration

settingsFields.name: allowManagedMcpServersOnly
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Only allowedMcpServers from managed settings are respected. deniedMcpServers still merges from all sources. Users can still add their own MCP servers, but only the admin-defined allowlist applies.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedPermissionRulesOnly
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Prevent user and project settings from defining allow, ask, or deny permission rules. Only rules in managed settings apply. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#permission-settings

settingsFields.name: alwaysThinkingEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable extended thinking by default for all sessions. Typically configured via the /config command rather than editing directly. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/common-workflows#use-extended-thinking-thinking-mode

settingsFields.name: apiKeyHelper
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that outputs authentication values

settingsFields.name: attribution
settingsFields.describe: Customize attribution for git commits and pull requests. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#attribution-settings

settingsFields.name: autoCompactWindow
settingsFields.describe: Auto-compact window size

settingsFields.name: autoDreamEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable background memory consolidation (auto-dream). When set, overrides the server-side default.

settingsFields.name: autoMemoryDirectory
settingsFields.describe: Custom directory path for auto-memory storage. Supports ~/ prefix for home-directory expansion. Ignored if set in checked-in project settings (.claude/settings.json) for security. Defaults to ~/.claude/projects/<sanitized-cwd>/memory/ when unset. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory

settingsFields.name: autoMemoryEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable automatic memory saves that capture useful context to .claude/memory/. Also configurable via CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_AUTO_MEMORY environment variable (set to 1 to disable, 0 to enable). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory#auto-memory

settingsFields.name: autoMode
settingsFields.describe: Customization for the auto mode classifier prompt. Typically configured in managed settings to tune the allow/deny rules used when permissions.defaultMode is "auto". By default, allow, soft_deny, and environment REPLACE the corresponding built-in classifier section entirely. Include the literal string "$defaults" as an array entry (added in v2.1.118) to splice the built-in defaults in at that position alongside your custom rules. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions

settingsFields.name: autoUpdatesChannel
settingsFields.describe: Release channel to follow for updates. Use "stable" for a version that is typically about one week old and skips versions with major regressions, or "latest" (default) for the most recent release. Set DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER=1 to disable background auto-updates, or DISABLE_UPDATES=1 (added in v2.1.118) to block all update paths including manual `claude update`.

settingsFields.name: availableModels
settingsFields.describe: Restrict which models users can select. When defined at multiple settings levels (user, project, etc.), arrays are merged and deduplicated. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/model-config#restrict-model-selection

settingsFields.name: awaySummaryEnabled
settingsFields.describe: @internal When false, the session recap (shown when you return after being away for 5+ minutes) is disabled. When absent or true, recap is enabled. Hidden from public SDK types until external launch; mirrors voiceHandsfree pattern above.

settingsFields.name: awsAuthRefresh
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that refreshes AWS authentication

settingsFields.name: awsCredentialExport
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that exports AWS credentials

settingsFields.name: blockedMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Blocklist of marketplace sources. These exact sources are blocked from being added as marketplaces. The check happens before downloading, so blocked sources never touch the filesystem.

settingsFields.name: channelsEnabled
settingsFields.describe: (Teams/Enterprise) Opt-in for channel notifications — MCP servers with the claude/channel capability pushing inbound messages. Default off. When true, users can select servers via --channels. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settingsFields.name: claudeMdExcludes
settingsFields.describe: Glob patterns for CLAUDE.md files to exclude from loading. Useful in monorepos to skip irrelevant instructions from other teams. Patterns match against absolute file paths. Arrays merge across settings layers. Managed policy CLAUDE.md files cannot be excluded. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory#exclude-specific-claude-md-files

settingsFields.name: cleanupPeriodDays
settingsFields.describe: Number of days to retain sessions, orphaned subagent worktrees, tasks, shell snapshots, and backups. Minimum is 1; setting 0 is rejected with a validation error. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: companyAnnouncements
settingsFields.describe: Company announcements to display at startup (one will be randomly selected if multiple are provided)

settingsFields.name: defaultShell
settingsFields.describe: Default shell for input-box ! commands. Default: bash. Using "powershell" routes ! commands through PowerShell on Windows and requires CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1 with pwsh on PATH. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: deniedMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise denylist of MCP servers that are explicitly blocked. If a server is on the denylist, it will be blocked across all scopes including enterprise. Denylist takes precedence over allowlist - if a server is on both lists, it is denied. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp#restriction-options

settingsFields.name: disableAllHooks
settingsFields.describe: Disable all hooks and statusLine execution. When true in managed settings, user and project-level disableAllHooks cannot override it. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks#disable-or-remove-hooks

settingsFields.name: disableAutoMode
settingsFields.describe: Disable auto mode

settingsFields.name: disableDeepLinkRegistration
settingsFields.describe: Set to "disable" to prevent Claude Code from registering the `claude://` deep-link protocol handler on startup. Most useful in managed settings where users cannot override it. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: disabledMcpjsonServers
settingsFields.describe: List of rejected MCP servers from .mcp.json. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settingsFields.name: disableSkillShellExecution
settingsFields.describe: Disable inline shell execution for `` !`...` `` and ` ```! ` blocks in skills and custom slash commands from user, project, plugin, or additional-directory sources. Commands are replaced with [shell command execution disabled by policy] instead of being run. Bundled and managed skills are not affected. Most useful in managed settings where users cannot override it. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: effortLevel
settingsFields.describe: Persist adaptive reasoning effort across sessions. Effort is supported on Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, and Sonnet 4.6. Opus 4.7 supports low/medium/high/xhigh/max (xhigh sits between high and max, added in v2.1.111); Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 support low/medium/high/max (xhigh falls back to high). Defaults: Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 default to high on all plans (Pro/Max raised from medium to high in v2.1.117); Opus 4.7 defaults to xhigh on Max plan. The max value is session-only unless set via CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL. Use /effort auto to reset to model default. Also configurable via CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL environment variable. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/model-config#adjust-effort-level

settingsFields.name: enableAllProjectMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Whether to automatically approve all MCP servers in the project. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settingsFields.name: enabledMcpjsonServers
settingsFields.describe: List of approved MCP servers from .mcp.json. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settingsFields.name: enabledPlugins
settingsFields.describe: Enabled plugins using plugin-id@marketplace-id format. Example: { "formatter@anthropic-tools": true }. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins

settingsFields.name: env
settingsFields.describe:
Environment variables to set for Claude Code sessions. Many environment variables provide settings dimensions not available as dedicated settings.json properties (e.g., thinking tokens, prompt caching, bash timeouts, shell configuration). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#environment-variables for the full list.
UNDOCUMENTED: CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS (plugin marketplace git timeout in ms, default 120000, see https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#2151).
UNDOCUMENTED: ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS (set to false to opt out of claude.ai MCP servers, see https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#2163).

settingsFields.name: extraKnownMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: Additional marketplaces to make available for this repository. Typically used in repository .claude/settings.json to ensure team members have required plugin sources. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-marketplaces

settingsFields.name: fastMode
settingsFields.describe: Enable fast mode for Opus 4.6 (research preview). Fast mode uses the same model with 2.5x faster output at higher per-token cost. Requires extra usage enabled. Alternatively, toggle with /fast command. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/fast-mode

settingsFields.name: fastModePerSessionOptIn
settingsFields.describe: Require per-session opt-in for fast mode. When true, fast mode does not persist across sessions and users must enable it with /fast each session. Useful for controlling costs. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/fast-mode

settingsFields.name: feedbackSurveyRate
settingsFields.describe: Probability (0–1) that the session quality survey appears when eligible. A value of 0.05 means 5% of eligible sessions. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: fileSuggestion
settingsFields.describe: Configure a custom script for @ file autocomplete. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#file-suggestion-settings

settingsFields.name: forceLoginMethod
settingsFields.describe: Force a specific login method: "claudeai" for Claude Pro/Max, "console" for Console billing

settingsFields.name: forceLoginOrgUUID
settingsFields.describe: Organization UUID to use for OAuth login

settingsFields.name: forceRemoteSettingsRefresh
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Block CLI startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched from the server. If the fetch fails, the CLI exits (fail-closed) rather than continuing with cached settings. When not set, startup continues without waiting for remote settings. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/server-managed-settings

settingsFields.name: gcpAuthRefresh
settingsFields.describe: Command to refresh GCP authentication (e.g., gcloud auth application-default login)

settingsFields.name: hooks
settingsFields.describe: Custom commands to run before/after tool executions. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks

settingsFields.name: httpHookAllowedEnvVars
settingsFields.describe: Allowlist of environment variable names HTTP hooks may interpolate into headers. When set, each hook's effective allowedEnvVars is the intersection with this list. Undefined = no restriction. Arrays merge across settings sources. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#hook-configuration

settingsFields.name: includeCoAuthoredBy
settingsFields.describe: DEPRECATED. Use 'attribution' instead. Whether to include the co-authored-by Claude byline in git commits and pull requests (default: true)

settingsFields.name: includeGitInstructions
settingsFields.describe: Include built-in git commit and PR workflow instructions in Claude's system prompt. Also configurable via CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_GIT_INSTRUCTIONS environment variable (set to 1 to disable). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#available-settings

settingsFields.name: language
settingsFields.describe: Preferred language for Claude's responses

settingsFields.name: minimumVersion
settingsFields.describe: Minimum Claude Code version to stay on. Prevents downgrades when switching release channels. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: model
settingsFields.describe: Override the default model used by Claude Code. For finer control, use environment variables: ANTHROPIC_MODEL (runtime override), ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL (per-class pinning), CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL (subagent model). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/model-config

settingsFields.name: modelOverrides
settingsFields.describe: Map Anthropic model IDs to provider-specific model IDs such as Bedrock inference profile ARNs, Vertex AI version names, or Foundry deployment names. Each model picker entry uses its mapped value when calling the provider API. Unknown keys are ignored. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/model-config#override-model-ids-per-version

settingsFields.name: otelHeadersHelper
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that outputs OpenTelemetry headers

settingsFields.name: outputStyle
settingsFields.describe: Controls the output style for assistant responses. Built-in styles: default, Explanatory, Learning. Custom styles can be added in ~/.claude/output-styles/ or .claude/output-styles/. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/output-styles

settingsFields.name: permissions
settingsFields.describe:
Tool usage permissions configuration.
See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions and https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#permission-settings
See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/tools-reference for full list of tools available to Claude.

settingsFields.name: plansDirectory
settingsFields.describe: Customize where plan files are stored. Path is relative to project root (default: ~/.claude/plans)

settingsFields.name: pluginConfigs
settingsFields.describe: Per-plugin configuration including MCP server user configs and plugin options, keyed by plugin ID (plugin@marketplace format). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins

settingsFields.name: pluginTrustMessage
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Custom message appended to the plugin trust warning shown before installation. Use to provide organization-specific context about approved plugins. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#plugin-settings

settingsFields.name: prefersReducedMotion
settingsFields.describe: Reduce or disable UI animations (spinners, shimmer, flash effects) for accessibility

settingsFields.name: promptSuggestionEnabled
settingsFields.describe: When false, prompt suggestions are disabled. When absent or true, prompt suggestions are enabled.

settingsFields.name: proxyAuthHelper
settingsFields.describe: Shell command that outputs a Proxy-Authorization header value (EAP)

settingsFields.name: prUrlTemplate
settingsFields.describe: URL template for the PR badge shown in the footer and in tool-result summaries. Substitutes placeholders {host}, {owner}, {repo}, {number}, {url} from the gh-reported PR URL. Use this to point PR links at an internal code-review tool instead of github.com. Does not affect #123 autolinks in Claude's prose. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: remote
settingsFields.describe: Remote session configuration

settingsFields.name: respectGitignore
settingsFields.describe: Control whether the @ file picker respects .gitignore patterns. When true (default), files matching .gitignore patterns are excluded from suggestions

settingsFields.name: sandbox
settingsFields.describe: Sandbox execution configuration. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandboxing

settingsFields.name: showClearContextOnPlanAccept
settingsFields.describe: When true, the plan-approval dialog offers a "clear context" option. Defaults to false.

settingsFields.name: showThinkingSummaries
settingsFields.describe: Show thinking summaries in the transcript view (Ctrl+O). Thinking summaries are not generated by default in interactive sessions; set to true to restore. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: showTurnDuration
settingsFields.describe: Show turn duration messages after responses (e.g., "Cooked for 1m 6s"). Set to false to hide these messages (default: true)

settingsFields.name: skillListingBudgetFraction
settingsFields.describe: Fraction of the context window (in characters) reserved for the skill listing sent to Claude (default: 0.01 = 1%). When the listing exceeds this, descriptions are shortened to fit. Raise to opt in to higher per-turn context cost.

settingsFields.name: skillListingMaxDescChars
settingsFields.describe: Per-skill description character cap in the skill listing sent to Claude (default: 1536). Descriptions longer than this are truncated. Raise to opt in to higher per-turn context cost.

settingsFields.name: skillOverrides
settingsFields.describe: Per-skill listing overrides keyed by skill name. "name-only" lists the skill without its description; "user-invocable-only" hides it from the model but keeps /name; "off" hides it from both. Absent = on.

settingsFields.name: skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt
settingsFields.describe: Whether the user has accepted the bypass permissions mode dialog. Typically managed by the CLI rather than set by hand.

settingsFields.name: skippedMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: List of marketplace names the user has chosen not to install when prompted

settingsFields.name: skippedPlugins
settingsFields.describe: List of plugin IDs (plugin@marketplace format) the user has chosen not to install when prompted

settingsFields.name: skipWebFetchPreflight
settingsFields.describe: Skip the WebFetch blocklist check for enterprise environments with restrictive security policies

settingsFields.name: spinnerTipsEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Show tips in the spinner while Claude is working. Set to false to disable tips (default: true)

settingsFields.name: spinnerTipsOverride
settingsFields.describe: Customize the tips displayed in the spinner while Claude is working. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#available-settings

settingsFields.name: spinnerVerbs
settingsFields.describe: Customize the verbs shown in spinner progress messages

settingsFields.name: sshConfigs
settingsFields.describe: SSH connection configurations for remote environments. Typically set in managed settings by enterprise administrators to pre-configure SSH connections for team members.

settingsFields.name: statusLine
settingsFields.describe: Custom status line display configuration. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/statusline

settingsFields.name: strictKnownMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings only) Allowlist of plugin marketplaces users can add. Undefined = no restrictions, empty array = lockdown. Uses exact matching for source specifications. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#strictknownmarketplaces

settingsFields.name: strictPluginOnlyCustomization
settingsFields.describe: (Managed settings) Block non-plugin customization sources for the listed surfaces. Array form locks specific surfaces (e.g., ["skills", "hooks"]); true locks all four; false is an explicit no-op. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference

settingsFields.name: subagentStatusLine
settingsFields.describe: Custom per-subagent status line shown in the agent panel; receives row context as JSON on stdin

settingsFields.name: syntaxHighlightingDisabled
settingsFields.describe: Whether to disable syntax highlighting in diffs

settingsFields.name: teammateMode
settingsFields.describe: How agent team teammates display: "auto" picks split panes in tmux or iTerm2, in-process otherwise. Agent teams are experimental and disabled by default. Enable them by adding CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS to your settings.json or environment. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-teams

settingsFields.name: terminalProgressBarEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable the terminal progress bar that shows progress in supported terminals like Windows Terminal and iTerm2 (default: true)

settingsFields.name: terminalTitleFromRename
settingsFields.describe: Whether /rename updates the terminal tab title (defaults to true). Set to false to keep auto-generated topic titles.

settingsFields.name: tui
settingsFields.describe: TUI rendering mode. Use "fullscreen" for the flicker-free alt-screen renderer with virtualized scrollback; "default" for the classic main-screen renderer. Corresponds to the /tui command. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: useAutoModeDuringPlan
settingsFields.describe: When true, apply the auto mode classifier during plan mode to auto-approve safe read-only tool calls while planning. Has no effect unless permissions.defaultMode allows auto. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions

settingsFields.name: viewMode
settingsFields.describe: Transcript view mode. "default" shows standard interactive view; "verbose" shows expanded tool details; "focus" shows prompt, one-line tool summaries, and final response only (Ctrl+O toggle). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: voice
settingsFields.describe: @internal Voice handsfree settings; behavior gated at read sites by feature(VOICE_HANDSFREE). Hidden from public SDK types until external launch; see TODO on voiceEnabled in entitlements.ts.

settingsFields.name: voiceEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable push-to-talk voice dictation. Typically written automatically when /voice is used. Requires a Claude.ai account. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: worktree
settingsFields.describe: Configuration for --worktree sessions. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

settingsFields.name: wslInheritsWindowsSettings
settingsFields.describe: (Windows managed settings only) When true, Claude Code on WSL reads managed settings from the Windows policy chain in addition to /etc/claude-code, with Windows sources taking priority. Only honored when set in the HKLM registry key or C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json, both of which require Windows admin to write. For HKCU policy to also apply on WSL, the flag must additionally be set in HKCU itself. Has no effect on native Windows. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings

globalFields.name: agentPushNotifEnabled
globalFields.describe: Allow Claude to push to your mobile device when it deems it appropriate (requires Remote Control)

globalFields.name: autoScrollEnabled
globalFields.describe: Auto-scroll conversation to bottom (fullscreen mode only)

globalFields.name: fileCheckpointingEnabled
globalFields.describe: Enable file checkpointing for code rewind

globalFields.name: inputNeededNotifEnabled
globalFields.describe: Push to your mobile device when a permission prompt or question is waiting (requires Remote Control)

globalFields.name: language
globalFields.describe: Preferred language for Claude responses and voice dictation (e.g.,

globalFields.name: remoteControlAtStartup
globalFields.describe: Enable Remote Control for all sessions (true | false | default)

globalFields.name: showTurnDuration
globalFields.describe: Show turn duration message after responses (e.g.,

globalFields.name: terminalProgressBarEnabled
globalFields.describe: Show OSC 9;4 progress indicator in supported terminals
